description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long cylindrical barrel with a vented muzzle brake at the front. The shotgun is equipped with a pistol grip and a full synthetic stock, providing ergonomic handling and stability. The receiver is robust and streamlined, with a visible pump-action for cycling rounds. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability. This shotgun is typical of those used by law enforcement or for home defense in urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a long barrel, pistol grip, full synthetic stock, and visible pump-action mechanism. The design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban law enforcement or defense.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the shotgun, including the barrel, pistol grip, full stock, and vented muzzle brake.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the pump-action fore-end and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented muzzle brake and extended length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no visible finger grooves
